summary: Script Lab 编辑器编译失败，TypeScript 类型错误导致页面显示 Failed to compile。错误位于 packages/editor/src/pages/Editor/store/editor/utilities.ts，TS2322 类型不匹配（CompletionItemKind provider 签名不兼容）。编辑器完全无法加载，粘贴操作稳定性无法测试。
observations: https://localhost:3000 显示 Failed to compile 错误画面
错误: TS2322 Type error in utilities.ts - CompletionItemKind provider 签名不匹配
错误信息: This error occurred during the build time and cannot be dismissed
编辑器代码面板完全不可访问
Runner :3200 可访问但只有输出面板无编辑器
